name: Savory Mushroom Salad Dressing
recipeIngredient: or 1 can (6 to 8 oz.) of canned mushrooms (drained)
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse and pat dry fresh mushrooms; slice to make about 2-3/4 cups, or drain canned mushrooms.
2. In a medium bowl, combine the salad oil, vinegar, minced garlic, salt, sugar, crumbled basil, ground cumin, and ground black pepper. Mix well.
3. Add the sliced mushrooms (or drained canned mushrooms) to the dressing and toss until fully coated.
4. Let the mixture stand for 5 minutes.
5. Spoon over lettuce wedges or toss with mixed greens.
Yield: about 1-1/4 cups
